libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. The reported javac failure is caused by a test calling ReflectionUtils.getSetter, which exists in plexus-utils 1.0.2 but not in 1.0-alpha-3; generated tests should target the 1.0-alpha-3 API surface instead of assuming newer helper methods.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8603 [Automation] javac compile fails for plexus:plexus-utils:1.0-alpha-3; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The old artifact exposes fewer APIs than 1.0.2, so reusing existing tests unchanged can cause compile failures.
Some CLI/file utility coverage may be OS-sensitive; prefer portable temporary files and simple local commands if exercising those APIs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: plexus-utils 1.0-alpha-3 is a self-contained Java utility jar; meaningful tests can cover its string, file/path, reflection, introspection, XML, DAG, and CLI helper APIs without extra dependencies, Docker services, or environment/system properties.
